provenance.source: reference/julia/derham.jl — Julia reimplementation of geode_core::derham::{gradient_map, curl_map, divergence_map} with matched sign conventions (TET_LOCAL_EDGES, TET_LOCAL_FACES, simplicial boundary alternation). Operators built directly in 0-based row-sorted CSR (SparseArrays' CSC storage is used only for the layout-invariant compositional-identity zero tests).
provenance.verified_against: reference/fixtures/derham/baseline.json (NumPy #149 canonical baseline; exact integer CSR-triple equality asserted by this generator) AND crates/geode-validation/tests/derham_julia_reference.rs (bit-exact integer CSR equality between Burn and Julia).

n_faces.description: Number of mesh faces (TetMesh::faces dedup order).

d1_data.description: d¹ CSR data — signed integers in {-1, +1}.

d2_data.description: d² CSR data — signed integers in {-1, +1}.

n_edges.description: Number of mesh edges (TetMesh::edges dedup order).

d2_indices.description: d² CSR column indices, sorted ascending within each row.

rank_d0.description: rank(d⁰) = n_nodes − 1 (β_0 = 1 on a connected mesh).

rank_d1.description: rank(d¹) = n_edges − n_nodes + 1 (β_1 = 0 on a ball).

euler_chi.description: Euler characteristic χ = n_nodes − n_edges + n_faces − n_tets. Equals 1 for a contractible 3-ball.

d0_data.description: d⁰ CSR data — signed integers in {-1, +1}.

d0_indices.description: d⁰ CSR column indices, sorted ascending within each row.

d1_indices.description: d¹ CSR column indices, sorted ascending within each row.

rank_d2.description: rank(d²) = n_faces − n_edges + n_nodes − 1 (β_2 = 0 on a ball).

description: Discrete de Rham complex (d⁰, d¹, d²) on the bundled sphere fixture — issue #168, parent epic #88, Phase I.2. Julia reference for geode_core::derham::{gradient_map, curl_map, divergence_map}, generated by reference/julia/derham.jl and verified exactly equal to the NumPy baseline (reference/fixtures/derham/baseline.json) at the canonicalized 0-based row-sorted CSR-triple level.

mesh_path.description: Mesh fixture (relative to repo root): reference/fixtures/sphere_pec/sphere.msh — bundled sphere-in-vacuum mesh, 774 nodes, 3335 tets. Same .msh consumed by the NumPy de Rham baseline.
